001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.LoadStatusRequest;
009
010/**
011 * Response message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.LoadStatusRequest}, opCode 21, size 3
012 *
013 * <br>
014 *
015 * 
016 * <table border='1'>
017 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
018 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>21</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
019 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>3</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
020 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#RESPONSE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
021 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CURRENT_STATUS}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
022 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>request</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.LoadStatusRequest}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
023 * </table>
024 */
025@MessageProps(
026    opCode=21,
027    size=3,
028    type=MessageType.RESPONSE,
029    characteristic=Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS,
030    request=LoadStatusRequest.class
031)
032// NOT a StatusMessage: byte 0 is "isLoadingActive", not a command status/NACK byte.
033public class LoadStatusResponse extends Message {
034    private int isLoadingActiveId;
035    private boolean isLoadingActive;
036    private int loadStateId;
037    private LoadState loadState;
038    private int primeStatusId;
039    private PrimeTubingStatus primeTubingStatus;
040    private PrimeNudgeStatus primeNudgeStatus;
041
042    public LoadStatusResponse() {
043        this.cargo = EMPTY;
044    }
045
046    public LoadStatusResponse(byte[] raw) {
047        parse(raw);
048    }
049
050    public LoadStatusResponse(boolean isLoadingActive, int loadStateId, int primeStatusId) {
051        this.cargo = buildCargo(isLoadingActive, loadStateId, primeStatusId);
052        parse(this.cargo);
053    }
054
055    public LoadStatusResponse(boolean isLoadingActive, LoadState loadState, int primeStatusId) {
056        this.cargo = buildCargo(isLoadingActive, loadState, primeStatusId);
057        parse(this.cargo);
058    }
059
060    /**
061     * Legacy constructor maintained for compatibility with prior pumpx2 releases where
062     * byte 0 was incorrectly treated as "status" and bytes 1/2 as an opaque short.
063     */
064    @Deprecated
065    public LoadStatusResponse(int status, int unknown) {
066        this.cargo = buildCargo(status, unknown);
067        parse(this.cargo);
068    }
069
070    /**
071     * <table border="1">
072     * <caption>Parsed fields for LoadStatusResponse:</caption>
073     * <tr><td><code>isLoadingActiveId</code></td><td><code>raw[0] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
074     * <tr><td><code>isLoadingActive</code></td><td><code>this.isLoadingActiveId != 0</code></td></tr>
075     * <tr><td><code>loadStateId</code></td><td><code>raw[1] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
076     * <tr><td><code>loadState</code></td><td><code>LoadState.fromId(loadStateId)</code></td></tr>
077     * <tr><td><code>primeStatusId</code></td><td><code>raw[2] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
078     * <tr><td><code>primeTubingStatus</code></td><td><code>loadState == LoadState.PRIME_TUBING ? PrimeTubingStatus.fromId(primeStatusId) : null</code></td></tr>
079     * <tr><td><code>primeNudgeStatus</code></td><td><code>loadState == LoadState.PRIME_NUDGE ? PrimeNudgeStatus.fromId(primeStatusId) : null</code></td></tr>
080     * </table>
081     */
082    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
083        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
084        this.cargo = raw;
085        this.isLoadingActiveId = raw[0] & 0xFF;
086        this.isLoadingActive = this.isLoadingActiveId != 0;
087        this.loadStateId = raw[1] & 0xFF;
088        this.loadState = LoadState.fromId(loadStateId);
089        this.primeStatusId = raw[2] & 0xFF;
090        this.primeTubingStatus = loadState == LoadState.PRIME_TUBING ? PrimeTubingStatus.fromId(primeStatusId) : null;
091        this.primeNudgeStatus = loadState == LoadState.PRIME_NUDGE ? PrimeNudgeStatus.fromId(primeStatusId) : null;
092    }
093
094    public static byte[] buildCargo(boolean isLoadingActive, int loadStateId, int primeStatusId) {
095        return new byte[]{
096                (byte) (isLoadingActive ? 1 : 0),
097                (byte) (loadStateId & 0xFF),
098                (byte) (primeStatusId & 0xFF)
099        };
100    }
101
102    public static byte[] buildCargo(boolean isLoadingActive, LoadState loadState, int primeStatusId) {
103        return buildCargo(isLoadingActive, loadState.getId(), primeStatusId);
104    }
105
106    public static byte[] buildCargo(boolean isLoadingActive, LoadState loadState, PrimeTubingStatus primeTubingStatus, PrimeNudgeStatus primeNudgeStatus) {
107        int primeStatusId = 0;
108        if (loadState == LoadState.PRIME_TUBING && primeTubingStatus != null) {
109            primeStatusId = primeTubingStatus.getId();
110        } else if (loadState == LoadState.PRIME_NUDGE && primeNudgeStatus != null) {
111            primeStatusId = primeNudgeStatus.getId();
112        }
113        return buildCargo(isLoadingActive, loadState, primeStatusId);
114    }
115
116    /**
117     * Legacy helper maintained for compatibility with older code.
118     * Equivalent to {@code byte[0]=status, byte[1]=unknown&0xFF, byte[2]=(unknown>>8)&0xFF}.
119     */
120    @Deprecated
121    public static byte[] buildCargo(int status, int unknown) {
122        return new byte[]{
123                (byte) (status & 0xFF),
124                (byte) (unknown & 0xFF),
125                (byte) ((unknown >> 8) & 0xFF)
126        };
127    }
128
129    public int getIsLoadingActiveId() {
130        return isLoadingActiveId;
131    }
132
133    public boolean getIsLoadingActive() {
134        return isLoadingActive;
135    }
136
137    public int getLoadStateId() {
138        return loadStateId;
139    }
140
141    public LoadState getLoadState() {
142        return loadState;
143    }
144
145    public int getPrimeStatusId() {
146        return primeStatusId;
147    }
148
149    public PrimeTubingStatus getPrimeTubingStatus() {
150        return primeTubingStatus;
151    }
152
153    public PrimeNudgeStatus getPrimeNudgeStatus() {
154        return primeNudgeStatus;
155    }
156
157    /**
158     * Matches Tandem's derived helper: true when loadState is one of
159     * CHANGE_CARTRIDGE / LOAD_CARTRIDGE / PRIME_TUBING.
160     */
161    public boolean getIsInLoadingState() {
162        return loadState == LoadState.CHANGE_CARTRIDGE
163                || loadState == LoadState.LOAD_CARTRIDGE
164                || loadState == LoadState.PRIME_TUBING;
165    }
166
167    /**
168     * Legacy compatibility alias for older pumpx2 versions where this was interpreted
169     * as a command status.
170     */
171    @Deprecated
172    public int getStatus() {
173        return getIsLoadingActiveId();
174    }
175
176    /**
177     * Legacy compatibility alias for older pumpx2 versions.
178     */
179    @Deprecated
180    public int getUnknown() {
181        return (getLoadStateId() & 0xFF) | ((getPrimeStatusId() & 0xFF) << 8);
182    }
183
184    public enum LoadState {
185        CHANGE_CARTRIDGE(0),
186        LOAD_CARTRIDGE(1),
187        PRIME_TUBING(2),
188        PRIME_CANNULA(3),
189        PRIME_NUDGE(4),
190        INVALID(5),
191        UNKNOWN(6),
192        ;
193
194        private final int id;
195        LoadState(int id) {
196            this.id = id;
197        }
198
199        public int getId() {
200            return id;
201        }
202
203        public static LoadState fromId(int id) {
204            for (LoadState s : values()) {
205                if (s.id == id) {
206                    return s;
207                }
208            }
209            return UNKNOWN;
210        }
211    }
212
213    public enum PrimeTubingStatus {
214        STOP(0),
215        START(1),
216        ENTERED_CAN_EXIT(2),
217        ENTERED_CANNOT_EXIT(3),
218        SUSPENDED(4),
219        UNKNOWN(5),
220        ;
221
222        private final int id;
223        PrimeTubingStatus(int id) {
224            this.id = id;
225        }
226
227        public int getId() {
228            return id;
229        }
230
231        public static PrimeTubingStatus fromId(int id) {
232            for (PrimeTubingStatus s : values()) {
233                if (s.id == id) {
234                    return s;
235                }
236            }
237            return UNKNOWN;
238        }
239    }
240
241    public enum PrimeNudgeStatus {
242        START(0),
243        COMPLETE(1),
244        UNKNOWN(2),
245        ;
246
247        private final int id;
248        PrimeNudgeStatus(int id) {
249            this.id = id;
250        }
251
252        public int getId() {
253            return id;
254        }
255
256        public static PrimeNudgeStatus fromId(int id) {
257            for (PrimeNudgeStatus s : values()) {
258                if (s.id == id) {
259                    return s;
260                }
261            }
262            return UNKNOWN;
263        }
264    }
265}
